backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a debt collection case management system with authorization, blob storage, and CRUD operations for cases, activities, and documents.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed UI improvements to the DocumentsSection component: layout redesign and addition of document type preview icons.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and recent changes, including authentication, routing, case management UI, and styling components.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the Kollect Lite application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Kollect Lite React application with viewport meta tag and root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component implementing TanStack Router with authentication checks via Internet Identity, routing to TaskQueue and CaseDetail pages.
Activity form component with action/outcome dropdowns, comments textarea, and history toggle that submits activities to the backend and displays the ActivityTimeline.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Timeline component fetching and displaying case activities from the backend in reverse chronological order with badges, timestamps, and payment details.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Compact case card component with gradient styling, customer ID with copy button, phone number display, status badge, and DPD indicator with color-coded severity.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A button component that copies text to clipboard and shows a check icon for 2 seconds after successful copy.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of dummy documents for a case with file type icons, upload dates, and buttons for uploading or scanning new documents.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with Kollect Lite branding and a logout button that clears authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper that includes the header, outlet for routed content, and a footer with branding and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page with Kollect Lite branding that triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: iPhone frame mockup component with notch, status bar, and scrollable content area for mobile UI previews.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Badge component that displays case status (escalated, active, PTP) with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating cases, activities, and documents through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes and Kollect Lite brand colors (teal-dark, teal-darker, gray-bg).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component that displays comprehensive information about a specific debt collection case, including debtor details, status, financial information, activity history, documents, and a phone mockup. Uses dummy data map for case lookup by ID.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Task queue page component that displays a searchable list of debt collection cases with filtering capabilities and a phone mockup. Contains dummy data for 20 collection cases with various statuses.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including color schemes using OKLCH color space, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features for redesigning DocumentsSection component layout and adding document preview icons, with one pending feature request.
